<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band05_chunk001.pdf#page=20 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band05 p38 -->

<!-- header: ALTOMUNISTER -->

<!-- header: ALTOMUNSTER -->


[[File:Band05_chunk001_p020_img001.jpg|thumb|E Vision der hl. Birgitt]]



[[File:Band05_chunk001_p020_img002.jpg|thumb]]



----
3 (



----
2 C ))
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band05 p39 -->
